vocab.meaning: món đồ sở hữu quý giá nhất
vocab.example: The vintage timepiece I received for my 18th birthday has since become a prize possession that I guard with my life.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ hài lòng và thích thú
vocab.example: I was tickled pink when my parents surprised me with a sleek smartwatch to help me stay on top of my fitness goals.

vocab.meaning: vớ được món hời/cực kỳ may mắn khi nhận được thứ gì đó
vocab.example: I really felt like I'd hit the jackpot when my mentor gifted me his limited-edition watch as a token of appreciation.

vocab.meaning: một vật phẩm sẽ trở thành đồ gia bảo trong tương lai
vocab.example: Because of its timeless design and durability, I view this gift as an heirloom in the making that I'll eventually pass down.

vocab.word: blow someone out of the water
vocab.meaning: vượt xa mọi sự mong đợi (gây bất ngờ lớn)
vocab.example: I’ve received many gifts, but the mechanical watch my partner chose for me absolutely blew the others out of the water.
